author: Alessandro Canepa
description: Multi-collection semantic tag suggestions. Create specialized classifiers for different note types with independent training and filtering. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Alessandro Canepa
manifest.description: Multi-collection semantic tag suggestions with learning/static dictionary modes and advanced filtering.
manifest.name: Auto Tagger

name: Auto Tagger

releases.author: canepa
releases.description:
## What's New

### Static Dictionary Improvements

- **Macro tag promotion** - Define macro groups in your dictionary (macros field). When a micro tag matches (e.g. claude), its parent macro (e.g. llm) is automatically added as a bonus tag. Macro tags are extra and do not consume any of the regular maxTags slots.
- **Alias resolution** - Aliases now work correctly: the left-hand word matches content, but the right-hand canonical name appears in the output. For example, anthropic -> claude means content mentioning Anthropic produces the tag claude, not anthropic.
- **Front-matter exclusion** - YAML front matter is always stripped before content matching; only the note body is scored.
- **Improved dictionaries** - All bundled dictionaries have been reviewed and updated.

releases.author: canepa
releases.description:
## What's new
- Added embedded dictionary snapshot fallback per collection (survives moved/renamed dictionary files)
- Refactored dictionary source loading into shared utilities
- Reduced textarea height for Include folders, Additional tags, and Additional stopwords
- Added stronger CSS override to prevent Obsidian modal default textarea height from forcing oversized fields
- README and build/version references updated

releases.author: canepa
releases.description:
## What's new
- Added static dictionary mode with local/vault/URL dictionary sources
- Added additional tags and additional stopwords for static mode
- Added example dictionaries in the dictionaries/ folder
- Improved dictionary metadata card and source management UI
- Updated README and manifest description

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ What's New
📊 Batch Operation Summaries

Detailed summary modal after batch operations showing:
Total files modified
Tags added and removed counts
Expandable file-by-file breakdown with color-coded changes
Easy verification of batch tagging results
🧹 Automatic Blacklist Cleanup

Blacklisted tags are now automatically removed from notes when processed
Applies to suggestions, auto-tag, and batch operations
Notification shown when tags are removed
🎯 Improvements
Enhanced batch operation feedback with collapsible details view
Better visibility into what changed during bulk tagging
Improved user confidence for large-scale operations
releases.name: v2.0.11 - Batch Summaries & Auto-Cleanup

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Replace console.log with console.debug (only warn/error/debug allowed)
- Use sentence case for UI text ('Advanced (enhanced)' not 'Advanced (Enhanced)')
- Remove direct style assignments, use CSS classes instead
- Replace confirm() with proper Modal for confirmations
- Fix async handler with void wrapper to avoid Promise warnings
- Add ConfirmModal class for destructive actions
- Add CSS class for version identifier styling
releases.name: v2.0.10 - fix: Comply with Obsidian plugin guidelines

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## ✨ What's New

### Dual Classifier System
- **Advanced Classifier**: Enhanced filtering with 55% threshold OR (45% similarity + 25% overlap) for higher precision
- **Basic Classifier**: Fast TF-IDF with 40% overlap threshold for broader coverage
- Choose the right classifier for each collection based on your needs

### Enhanced Debug & Statistics
- 📊 Detailed statistics view: vocabulary size, top tags, training date, avg docs/tag
- 🐛 Debug mode improvements: comprehensive logging bound to settings toggle
- Disabled "Clear training" button when no training data exists

### Bug Fixes & Improvements
- 🛡️ Fixed Object.prototype pollution using Object.create(null)
- 🔒 Added defensive NaN/Infinity checks throughout TF-IDF calculation
- 🧹 Cleaned up console output - no debug spam unless enabled
- 📚 Updated README with classifier comparison and debug mode documentation

## 🔧 Technical Details
- Removed N-gram embeddings (kept for overlap calculation only) for better tag discrimination
- Advanced classifier prioritizes semantic relevance over generic keyword matching
- Adaptive weighting system adjusts similarity vs overlap importance dynamically
releases.name: v2.0.9 - Dual Classifier System & Debug Improvements

releases.author: canepa
releases.description:
## Changes

- **Settings UI**: Proper delete confirmation dialog
- **Settings**: AutoTaggerPlugin type alias reduces code duplication

- **Settings**: Clear feedback when duplicating collections
- **README**: Removed duplicate sections, improved organization
- **Code cleanup**: Removed legacy classifier files

## Improvements

- More intuitive collection deletion workflow
- Cleaner, more maintainable codebase
- Better documentation structure
releases.name: v2.0.8: Improved Settings UX and README

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Updated development dependencies and improved deployment configuration management.

### What's Changed
- Modernized Dependencies: Updated to TypeScript 5.3, ESLint 9, and @typescript-eslint v8
- Security Fix: Upgraded esbuild from 0.17.3 to 0.25.0
- Secure Deployment Config: Moved vault path to git-ignored deploy.config.ps1 file
- Code Quality: Removed async keywords from synchronous methods
- Development Experience: Added example config file for easier project setup
releases.name: v2.0.7 - Dependency & Configuration Updates

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🔧 Improvements

Further code refinements and optimizations.

### What's Changed
- Enhanced embedding classifier implementation
- Improved code structure and readability

No functional changes - all features work exactly as before.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/canepa/plugin-obsidian-classifier/compare/2.0.5...2.0.6
releases.name: 2.0.6 - Performance & Code Quality

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🔧 Bug Fixes & Compliance

This release addresses all violations identified by the Obsidian review bot to ensure full compliance with plugin guidelines:

### Fixed Issues
- ✅ Replaced all `console.log` statements with `console.debug` (17 instances)
- ✅ Removed unnecessary `async` keywords from methods without `await` expressions
- ✅ Added proper handling for floating promises with `void` operator
- ✅ Wrapped async event handlers in IIFE to prevent Promise returns
- ✅ Replaced `any` types with proper TypeScript types (`unknown`, `EmbeddingClassifier`)
- ✅ Fixed settings heading to comply with naming guidelines
- ✅ Added public methods for accessing classifier data

### Technical Improvements
- Enhanced ESLint configuration with TypeScript project support
- Added `getTagDocCount()` method to EmbeddingClassifier for proper data access
- Improved type safety throughout the codebase

No functional changes - all features work exactly as before.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/canepa/plugin-obsidian-classifier/compare/2.0.3...2.0.4
releases.name: 2.0.5 - Code Quality Improvements
